coarse_unlocks.title: Plants in the meadow
coarse_unlocks.detail: Grasses, wildflowers, and seedlings hold the meadow together and feed almost everything that visits.

coarse_unlocks.title: Insects in the meadow
coarse_unlocks.detail: Bees, beetles, butterflies, and tiny hoppers move between stems and blooms all day long.

coarse_unlocks.title: Mammals in the woodland
coarse_unlocks.detail: Squirrels, deer, foxes, and quieter neighbors leave tracks, chewed nuts, and bedded grass under the trees.

coarse_unlocks.title: Birds in the woodland
coarse_unlocks.detail: Songs drift between the branches as birds search bark and leaves for seeds and small insects.

coarse_unlocks.title: Birds in the sky
coarse_unlocks.detail: Some birds rise above the trees, riding wind and sunlight to travel, hunt, or simply look around.

coarse_unlocks.title: Amphibians at the pond
coarse_unlocks.detail: Frogs, toads, and salamanders begin life in the water and slip between pond and shore as they grow.

coarse_unlocks.title: Fish in the pond
coarse_unlocks.detail: Below the surface, fish glide through cool water, feeding on insects, plants, and even smaller fish.

coarse_unlocks.title: Snails and mussels at the pond
coarse_unlocks.detail: Soft-bodied animals with shells creep across mud and plant stems, filtering and grazing as they go.

coarse_unlocks.title: Fungi in the soil
coarse_unlocks.detail: Threads of fungus weave through the ground, breaking down fallen wood and feeding nearby roots.

coarse_unlocks.title: Worms in the soil
coarse_unlocks.detail: Earthworms and their relatives pull leaves underground and tunnel through the dirt, mixing it as they move.

coarse_unlocks.title: City birds
coarse_unlocks.detail: Pigeons, sparrows, gulls, and crows live among buildings, finding food and nest spots in the busy edges of town.

coarse_unlocks.title: Something unexpected
coarse_unlocks.detail: Not every find fits a clear group at first. Sometimes the most interesting moment is the one you cannot name yet.
